email_3362787.subject: Exploring Flexible Dosing Options with ZENPEP for Your Patients
email_3362787.email_body:
Dear Dr. Perdomo,

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to reach out to discuss an opportunity to enhance your treatment options for patients with EPI. Given your current experience with CREON and recent prescriptions of ZENPEP, I believe ZENPEP's unique formulation and flexible dosing can be advantageous for your practice.

ZENPEP offers a non-enteric-coated microsphere formulation with 5 strengths ranging from 3K to 40K lipase units, allowing for precise titration tailored to your patients' needs. Many of your peers, including Dr. James Wilson, have found this flexibility beneficial, especially when addressing access concerns. Additionally, the ZenConnect co-pay program ensures affordability, with most commercial patients paying $0 per month.

I would love to provide more information on how ZENPEP can fit into your treatment plans. Please let me know if you would like to review the APEX trial data or discuss further.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
key_discussion_points: Flexible dosing with 5 strengths (3K-40K lipase units)
ZenConnect co-pay program ($0/month for most commercial patients)
